sources.freshness_watch_reason: DevHub request types, upload staging, certification, and post-submission guidance affect agent guardrails.
Single PDF and supporting document rules affect upload readiness and document gap analysis.

agent-ready-source-freshness-current.label: Source freshness has been checked for cited PP&D guidance.
agent-ready-source-freshness-current.readiness_gate: block source-backed advice when changed source hashes are unresolved

agent-ready-required-documents-current.label: Required document lists reflect the latest public guidance fixture.
agent-ready-required-documents-current.readiness_gate: rerun gap analysis before drafting upload staging

agent-ready-action-gates-current.label: Consequential DevHub action gates reflect current public guidance.
agent-ready-action-gates-current.readiness_gate: require attended exact confirmation before official actions

agent-ready-file-rules-current.label: File preparation rules are current for document staging.
agent-ready-file-rules-current.readiness_gate: block upload staging when file rules are stale
